item.title: AdaTurn：主动视觉感知代理的预算感知测试时间缩放
item.summary: arXiv:2607.14547v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Active visual agents solve fine-grained image tasks by interleaving reasoning with image-grounding actions across multiple turns.
